---
title: "Nonlinear Dynamics"
---

<div class="updated-time">Updated: 2026-04-07 12:00 AEDT</div>

Notes on nonlinear dynamics: phase portraits, bifurcations, stability analysis, and physical applications.
Tag legend: `Definition` marks a definition, `Theory` marks a theorem or principle, `Inference` marks a derivation step, and `Result` marks a conclusion or application takeaway.

<div class="note-cards">
<div class="note-card">
<a href="1%20Nonlinear%20Dynamics.md">Nonlinear Dynamics</a>
<div class="card-desc">Autonomous systems, bifurcations, eigenvalue methods, Hamiltonian mechanics</div>
</div>
<div class="note-card">
<a href="2%20Photon%20Physics%20and%20Laser.md">Photon Physics and Laser</a>
<div class="card-desc">Energy quantization, laser threshold, transcritical bifurcation</div>
</div>
</div>
